description:
The LinearForce component applies force to all particles within a system towards a direction regardless of particle position.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.Force: The direction to force particles in.
fields.OverrideForceSpace: What Transform space the force direction is in rather than in the particle system's local space.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
